title: Good: l2_payload.py is minimal and correct
description:
src/lichen/l2_payload.py demonstrates good simplicity:
- Single responsibility: dispatch byte classification
- No unnecessary abstractions
- Enum for type safety
- Clear, short functions with obvious implementations
- Well-named (classify_l2_payload, wrap_schc_payload)

Example of 'boring code that works' - the right level of abstraction.
